zh.Wraxall, Somerset, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特福拉薩爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ralph Gorges於大約1241年出生在英國薩默塞特時，他的父親Sir Ralph Gorges38歲，母親Eleanor de Morville23歲。他於大約1269年與Maud de Lovel在英國英格蘭薩默塞特福拉薩爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1297年5月9日之前在法國加斯可。

zh-hans.Wraxall, Somerset, England: 英国英格兰薩默塞特福拉薩爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Ralph Gorges于大约1241年出生在英国薩默塞特时，他的父亲Sir Ralph Gorges38岁，母亲Eleanor de Morville23岁。他于大约1269年与Maud de Lovel在英国英格兰薩默塞特福拉薩爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1297年5月9日之前在法国加斯可。

nameMeanings.name: Gorges
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Claus, Erwin, Heinz, Otto, Wilhelm.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of various places in France named with Old French gorge ‘gorge, ravine’ (see Gorge 2).

variants.name: Gorge
meanings: French: topographic name for someone who lived by or in a deep valley, from Old French gorge ‘gorge, ravine’ (from Old French gorge ‘throat’), or a habitational name from any of various places in France named with this word.
English: variant of   Gorges   2 or   George  .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ralph Gorges was born about 1241, in Somerset, England, his father, Sir Ralph Gorges, was 38 and his mother, Eleanor de Morville, was 23. He married Maud de Lovel about 1269, in Wraxall, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died before 9 May 1297, in Gascogne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ralph Gorges est né environ 1241, à Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir Ralph Gorges, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Eleanor de Morville, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Maud de Lovel environ 1269, à Wraxall, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé avant 9 mai 1297, à Gascogne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Ralph Gorges um 1241 in Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Ralph Gorges 38 und seine Mutter Eleanor de Morville 23. Er hat um 1269 in Wraxall, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Maud de Lovel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb vor 9. Mai 1297 in Gascogne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Gorges è nato il circa 1241 nel Somerset, England, il suo padre, Sir Ralph Gorges, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor de Morville, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Maud de Lovel circa 1269, nel Wraxall, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 9 maggio 1297, nel Gascogne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Gorgesが約1241年にイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Gorgesは38歳，母Eleanor de Morvilleは23歳であった。約1269年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトウラクサルでMaud de Lovelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1297年5月9日以前にフランスガスコグンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Gorges(이)가 대략 1241년 영국 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Ralph Gorges(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor de Morville(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1269년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 라스알에서 Maud de Lovel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1297년 5월 9일 이전 프랑스 가스코그니에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Gorges nasceu aproximadamente 1241, em Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Ralph Gorges, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor de Morville, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud de Lovel aproximadamente 1269, em Wraxall, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 9 de maio de 1297, em Gascogne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ralph Gorges родился около 1241 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Ralph Gorges было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor de Morville, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud de Lovel около 1269 г. в местности раксалл, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер перед 9 май 1297 г. в местности гаскогн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Ralph Gorges nació aproximadamente 1241, en Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Ralph Gorges, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Eleanor de Morville, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Maud de Lovel aproximadamente 1269, en Wraxall, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió antes de 9 de mayo de 1297, en Gascogne, Francia.
